author: GreQ + Codex
name: Whole-Model GTA CUDA Path
blurb: Standalone packed-GTA non-record draft with an inline CUDA plus cuBLAS whole-model forward/eval path and a manual packed-buffer reverse pass. A finished 1x RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell run reached pre-quant 1.4984 BPB and post-quant 1.5345 BPB under the 16 MB artifact cap.
